302 → https://app.com/callback?code=abc123"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="860" y="550" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="500" y="550" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_ysjgL95NfOYy1OJspGj-16" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=14;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#FF9800;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" value="⚠️ 這是授權碼，不是 Access Token！
